roles.title: How will you use NOVAT?
roles.desc: We'll surface the right areas — you can change this anytime.

solo.label: Solo
solo.desc: Focus on tasks, calendar and work time — lean and clear.

team.label: Team
team.desc: Projects, chat and shared boards front and center.

social.label: Social
social.desc: Social insights and content planning first — tasks stay handy.

welcome.title: Welcome to NOVAT
welcome.desc: Your all-in-one tool for tasks, projects, calendar and time tracking — for you and your team.

role.title: Your mode
role.desc: Pick Solo, Team or Social — NOVAT tunes navigation and features accordingly.

capture.title: AI quick capture
capture.desc: On the dashboard, type or dictate tasks and appointments — AI detects date, time and priority.

calendar.title: Connect your calendar
calendar.desc: Connect Google, Outlook or iCal in settings — all appointments in one place.

projects.title: Projects & Kanban
projects.desc: Create boards for your team, assign tasks and track time with the built-in timer.

worktime.title: Track work time
worktime.desc: Clock in/out or enter hours retroactively. 8 = 8 hours, not 8 minutes.

settings.title: Settings & guide
settings.desc: Choose German or English, hide features you don't need, and read the full guide under Settings → Guide.
